question:
Consider the convex quadratically constrained quadratic program over x in R^3:
Minimize (1/2) x^T Q_0 x + c_0^T x
subject to x^T Q_i x + c_i^T x <= d_i for i=1..2,
and ||x||_2^2 <= 29.697.

Q_0 = [[4, 2, -3], [2, 3, -3], [-3, -3, 6]]
c_0 = [0, 2, 1]
Q_1 = [[5.5, 3, 3], [3, 5.5, 1], [3, 1, 3.5]], c_1 = [3, -3, 0], d_1 = 21.0
Q_2 = [[6.5, 3, 1], [3, 5.5, 1], [1, 1, 5.5]], c_2 = [3, 0, -3], d_2 = 39.0

What is the minimum value of the objective (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the convex quadratically constrained quadratic program over x in R^3:
Minimize (1/2) x^T Q_0 x + c_0^T x
subject to x^T Q_i x + c_i^T x <= d_i for i=1..2,
and ||x||_2^2 <= 19.485.

Q_0 = [[10, -1, 2], [-1, 10, 6], [2, 6, 9]]
c_0 = [-2, -3, 1]
Q_1 = [[12.5, 6, -2], [6, 5.5, -4], [-2, -4, 5.5]], c_1 = [0, 2, -3], d_1 = 31.0
Q_2 = [[3.5, -6, 1], [-6, 12.5, -2], [1, -2, 9.5]], c_2 = [-3, 3, -1], d_2 = 5.0

What is the minimum value of the objective (rounded to 3 decimals)?
